item.title: I’d consider FF7 one of the best video games ever made, the story, the art, the music… it’s a masterpiece that stands the test of time. I get super nostalgic about this one #FF7 #FinalFantasyVII #classicgames #CloudStrife #sephiroth
item.description: I’d consider FF7 one of the best video games ever made, the story, the art, the music… it’s a masterpiece that stands the test of time. I get super nostalgic about this one #FF7 #FinalFantasyVII #classicgames #CloudStrife #sephiroth
item.author: lightweaverart
